title: biscutella laevigata subsp. varia
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. varia, also known as varietal smooth biscutella, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. Biscutella laevigata subsp. varia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used in the form of tinctures or ointments for topical application.
